# Feature Request Template

## Title
Brief and clear description of the feature request

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or limitation you are facing. Explain why the current system is not sufficient.

## Proposed Solution
Explain the feature you want to add and how it should work. Be specific about behavior and expected outcome.

## Use Case
Describe real scenarios where this feature would be used. Include examples if possible.

## Expected Behavior
What should happen when the feature is implemented.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Impact
Explain how this feature improves the system (performance, usability, flexibility, etc.)

## Additional Context
Any extra notes, screenshots, or technical details that may help implementation.
